caption:
5 AI agent repos just broke GitHub this week.

Not chatbots. Not copilots. Autonomous agents that control browsers, predict markets, and operate your entire dev stack.

This is what developers are building right now. March 2026.

Which one are you starring? 👇

#aiagents #github #coding #programming #ai #developer #opensource #machinelearning #agents #trending

slides.title: AI Agent Repos That Broke GitHub This Week
slides.subtitle: March 2026. These repos gained 10K-23K stars in 7 days.

slides.title: superpowers — agentic skills framework
slides.desc: A methodology for giving AI agents real capabilities. +19K stars in one week. 100K total.
slides.code:
# Install agent superpowers
npx superpowers init

# Your agent can now:
# - Read and write files
# - Run terminal commands
# - Search the web
# - Control browsers
# - Deploy applications
# All from natural language.
slides.punchline: 100K stars in weeks. The fastest-growing agent repo ever.

slides.title: agency-agents — multi-agent teams
slides.desc: Specialized AI agents with distinct expertise working together. +23K stars this week.
slides.code:
# Define your agent team
agents:
  frontend_wizard:
    role: "React/Next.js expert"
    tools: [browser, figma, code]
  
  backend_ops:
    role: "API and database specialist"
    tools: [postgres, redis, deploy]
  
  security_auditor:
    role: "Vulnerability scanner"
    tools: [code, network, logs]
slides.punchline: +23K stars in 7 days. Agents aren't solo anymore.

slides.title: MiroFish — 700K agents predict anything
slides.desc: Swarm intelligence engine. An undergrad built it in 10 days. Got $4M funding in 24 hours.
slides.code:
from mirofish import Swarm

# 700,000 agents vote on predictions
swarm = Swarm(agents=700_000)

result = swarm.predict(
  question="Will BTC hit 150K by June?",
  context=market_data
)

print(result.confidence)  # 0.73
print(result.consensus)   # "Likely"
slides.punchline: Built in 10 days. $4M in 24 hours. 36K stars.

slides.title: page-agent — control any website with English
slides.desc: Add one script tag. Type what you want. The AI does it. By Alibaba.
slides.punchline: One line of JS. Your browser has an AI pilot.

slides.title: OpenViking — memory for AI agents
slides.desc: Context database by ByteDance. Agents remember everything across sessions.
slides.code:
from openviking import ContextDB

db = ContextDB()

# Agent stores what it learns
db.store(
  key="user_preferences",
  context=learned_prefs,
  ttl="30d"
)

# Any agent can recall it later
prefs = db.recall("user_preferences")
# Persistent memory across sessions
slides.punchline: Agents that remember. By ByteDance. +10K stars in a week.
